title: The sovereign capital, global chipmakers and serial investors behind Europe’s new unicorns
summary:
Europe’s newest unicorns are backed by a large cohort of more than 300 investors. Among them, 25 investors have backed two or more unicorns minted this year at any point in their funding history.

Federico Scolari is a senior intelligence analyst and data lead at Sifted. Find him on  LinkedIn
